[ Black Seven — Consultancy ]

Helping businesses build,
improve and grow

Black Seven Consultancy provides strategic business advice, operational support and practical solutions that help organisations achieve sustainable growth

[ About ]

We work with businesses, entrepreneurs and investors to improve performance, strengthen operations and create long-term value through practical, commercially focused advice.

Our work sits closer to the operating table than the boardroom slide deck. We spend time inside the business — understanding how decisions actually get made, where value leaks out, and what's realistically fixable in the next quarter versus the next year.

Clients typically come to us at a point of change: a business scaling past the point its original structure can support, an owner preparing for investment or exit, or a leadership team that needs an outside view to see what's become invisible from the inside.

[ Services ]

What we do

[ 01 ] Business Strategy Clear-eyed diagnosis of where a business stands today, and a practical plan for where it goes next — grounded in the numbers, not just the narrative
[ 02 ] Operations & Transformation Rebuilding the systems, structures and processes underneath a business so growth doesn't outpace the organisation's ability to deliver on it
[ 03 ] Project Delivery Hands-on execution of the initiatives that come out of strategy work — because a plan only creates value once it's actually delivered
[ Our approach ]

How we work

[ Diagnose ] Understand the business as it actually runs Time on the ground with the team, the data and the decisions — before any recommendation is made
[ Design ] Build a plan suited to this business Practical, sequenced recommendations shaped around the constraints and ambitions that are actually in play
[ Deliver ] Stay through execution We work alongside teams to implement, adjust and see change through — not just hand over a document
©BLACK7

Great businesses start here. Yours should too.

Your business deserves more than attention — it deserves discipline. Let's build it for the long term
